name: git-diff-viewer
description: Codex plugin proof of concept for launching a local Git Diff Viewer UI.

interface.shortDescription: Launch a local Next.js UI for Git diff review workflows.
interface.longDescription: Proof of concept for a Codex plugin that starts a local Next.js Git Diff Viewer app when invoked from a Codex thread.
defaultPrompt: Launch the Git Diff Viewer UI.
